name: Another Round
about: Another Round is a versatile entertainment venue that combines a private event space with optional golf simulator bays. The venue is designed for groups of up to 50 guests, with the option to expand to 100 by adding golf simulator bays from its partner, West End Golf Club. It features a full suite of amenities including a large screen TV, sound system, and various games like foosball and darts. Pricing is flexible, ranging from bring-your-own-food-and-drinks packages to all-inclusive options with bartender services. Memberships provide access to the space and discounted rates on golf simulator bay rentals.
why_golfers_like_it: Optional golf simulator bays with professional-level accuracy
Access to premium simulators at a discounted rate through membership
Flexible space allows for social golfing while enjoying food and drinks
Technology partnership with West End Golf Club for a premium experience

food_and_drink.notes: Guests can bring their own catering, food deliveries, or work with the venue for custom packages.
The venue is BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage), with bar countertops provided for serving.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own golf clubs if you are utilizing the optional golf simulator bay add-on.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is BYOB and allows you to bring your own drinks and catering.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time is not specified, but golf simulator bay rentals are available for groups to play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the space is designed for family gatherings and features games like foosball and darts that are suitable for all ages.
